rule_text: Reverse Tendering procedure is MANDATORY for procurement of Goods, Services and Works of value Rs.1.00 crore and above by all AP Departments, PSUs, Societies, Universities, Local Bodies and Institutions.
source_clause: GO Ms No 79 / Finance Dept dated 24-08-2020, Order Para 5
verification_method: Check tender file documents reverse-auction round on apeprocurement.gov.in (or APTS platform); reject single-round bid evaluations for tenders >= Rs.1 cr

rule_text: AP CEO of APCFSS must withhold payment for tenders of value Rs.1 crore and above where reverse-tendering process was not adopted; violations must be reported to the Finance Department.
source_clause: GO Ms No 79 / Finance Dept dated 24-08-2020, Order Para 8
verification_method: Check tender execution chain: payment release requires reverse-tendering compliance certificate from APCFSS

rule_text: MD of APTS must enable reverse-tendering functionality on the AP e-procurement platform for all Goods, Services and Works tenders of Rs.1 crore and above.
source_clause: GO Ms No 79 / Finance Dept dated 24-08-2020, Order Para 7
verification_method: Check tender NIT references reverse-tendering on apeprocurement.gov.in; reject tenders that opted out of platform reverse-tender feature

rule_text: GO Ms No 79/2020 establishes Reverse Tendering as a parallel mandate alongside Judicial Preview (GO Ms No 79/2020 Para 2) — both apply to AP infrastructure procurement, with thresholds Rs.1 crore for reverse tendering and Rs.100 crore for judicial preview.
source_clause: GO Ms No 79 / Finance Dept dated 24-08-2020 read with AP Judicial Preview Act 2019
verification_method: For AP tenders: if value>=Rs.1cr require reverse-tendering audit trail; if value>=Rs.100cr ALSO require Judicial Preview certificate
